package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "path/filepath"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for filepath_join_with_user_path: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `filepath.Join(baseDir, userInput)` without subsequent `filepath.Rel` or path-containment validation
type CaseFilepathJoinWithUserPathDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseFilepathJoinWithUserPathModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseFilepathJoinWithUserPathRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseFilepathJoinWithUserPathModel
}

type CaseFilepathJoinWithUserPathService struct {
    repo *CaseFilepathJoinWithUserPathRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseFilepathJoinWithUserPathAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeFilepathJoinWithUserPath(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseFilepathJoinWithUserPathDTO) error {
    focus := "filepath_join_with_user_path"
    _ = focus
    clean := filepath.Clean(input)
    _ = clean
    filepath_join_user_path_negative := map[string]int{"filepath": 1, "join": 2, "user": 3, "path": 4}
    filepath_join_user_path_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    filepath_negative_0 := filepath_join_user_path_negative["filepath"] + len(input)
    _ = filepath_negative_0
    join_negative_1 := filepath_join_user_path_negative["join"] + len(input)
    _ = join_negative_1
    user_negative_2 := filepath_join_user_path_negative["user"] + len(input)
    _ = user_negative_2
    path_negative_3 := filepath_join_user_path_negative["path"] + len(input)
    _ = path_negative_3
    return nil
}
